location.office_time_required: no required commute; occasional travel for team off-sites

level_signals: Lead and coach a team of Growth AEs

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 3–5+ years of sales leadership experience at a high-growth SaaS company, ideally managing mid-market or growth segments.
A strong track record of coaching AEs to consistently hit and exceed quota in a high-velocity sales environment.
Deep operational rigor, with experience managing pipeline health, forecasting, and rep productivity.
Excellent communication and coaching skills, with the ability to develop early-career and mid-career AEs.
A collaborative mindset and ability to work closely with Marketing, RevOps, and Customer Success to scale a repeatable growth motion.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 3–5+ years of sales leadership experience at a high-growth SaaS company, ideally managing mid-market or growth segments.

scope.surface: Growth segment sales — helping rapidly growing companies adopt Linear across product and engineering organizations
scope.business_model: B2B SaaS, product-led growth with sales-assisted expansion
core_responsibilities: Lead and coach a team of Growth AEs, helping them run disciplined discovery, manage active pipelines, and close expansion opportunities with fast-growing companies.
Establish strong operating rigor around pipeline management, forecasting accuracy, and opportunity qualification to drive consistent revenue performance.
Work closely with Marketing and Growth teams to convert inbound demand into qualified opportunities and ensure strong pipeline coverage.
Identify patterns across customer conversations and funnel data to continuously refine messaging, segmentation, and sales playbooks.
Partner with Customer Success to ensure smooth onboarding and identify expansion opportunities as customers grow their teams.

compensation.equity_form: Competitive salary and equity; employee-friendly equity terms including early exercise in the US and extended exercise windows

green_flags: Remote-first with no required commute; open to all of North America
Competitive equity terms including early exercise and extended windows — unusually candidate-friendly
5 weeks paid vacation plus local statutory holidays
Company has strong traction: 25,000+ customers including OpenAI, Coinbase, Ramp
Series C funded; recent liquidity event for team
red_flags: Visa sponsorship and work authorization not addressed
Team size for the Growth AE team not specified
Role is 'Manager, Growth Sales' — not a pure PM role; archetype is 'Other', may not match PM-focused job seekers
